overall.description: A cinematic game engine scene set in a Victorian-style greenhouse classroom filled with magical plants and potting stations. The stationary third-person camera observes students in wizard robes tending to botanical specimens, including large carnivorous plants in stone planters, while natural light filters through the glass and metal framework.

scene_state.functional_zone: greenhouse classroom with potting stations and carnivorous plants

agents.ego_description: stationary near a large carnivorous plant, observing the greenhouse environment and other students

notable_agents.action: student in dark robes and pointed hat walking from left to right along the cobblestone path

entered.detail: curved glass and metal framework forming the roof and walls of the greenhouse
large magical venus flytrap with pink fleshy mouths and red stems in a stone planter
large circular stone container holding the carnivorous plant
long wooden tables with soil and seedlings arranged in rows
decorative metal drainage grate set into the cobblestone floor
trailing green vines hanging from the greenhouse framework overhead

segments.scene_description: The scene opens in a sunlit greenhouse classroom with a curved glass roof and metal framework. Wooden potting tables line the center aisle while a large carnivorous plant sits in a stone planter in the right foreground. A student in dark robes walks across the frame from left to right, while another student in white robes works in the background. The camera remains stationary, capturing the warm, natural light filtering through the glass and the dense vegetation filling the space.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot captures a serene moment within a sunlit greenhouse classroom where natural light illuminates a space dedicated to magical botany. It begins with a wide view of the curved glass roof and metal framework, establishing a warm atmosphere as light filters through the dense vegetation. As the camera holds its position, a student in dark robes glides across the frame from left to right, momentarily intersecting the view of a large carnivorous plant rooted in a stone planter in the foreground. The scene then settles on the depth of the room, where another student in white robes continues their work amidst the wooden potting tables that line the central aisle.
